colonial.def: 殖民的、殖民地住民人物 (單數)
colonial.col: colonial rule, colonial style, colonial power
colonial.ex: The old town has many beautiful colonial buildings.

colonialism.ex: Colonialism left a deep mark on the nation's history.

colonialist.ex: The colonialist policies were criticized by many.

colonist.def: 殖民者、開拓者人物 (單數)
colonist.ex: The early colonists faced many hard challenges.

colonize.ex: One day humans might try to colonize the moon.

colonization.ex: The rapid colonization of the land changed it.

colonnade.ex: The palace had a grand and long marble colonnade.

colony.def: 殖民地、僑居地、群體的人物 (單數)
colony.col: ant colony, crown colony, penal colony
colony.ex: The workers found a massive ant colony in the yard.

color/colour.def: 顏色、色彩、趣味、渲染、口紅的人的人的人物
color/colour.col: primary color, show one's true colors (露原形), off color (不適)
color/colour.ex: What is your favorite color for a new bedroom?

coloration.def: 著色、外觀、色彩人物 (單數)
coloration.ex: The bird's brown coloration helps it to hide.

color-blind.def: 色盲的、對種族無偏見地 (盲)
color-blind.ex: He is color-blind and cannot see red or green.

colored/coloured.def: 有色的、粉飾的、色人的人的人 (或物)
colored/coloured.ex: She used bright colored pencils for her drawing.

colorful/colourful.def: 色彩鮮豔的、有趣的、生動地 (艷)
colorful/colourful.ex: The city has a very long and colorful history.

coloring/colouring.def: 著色、外觀、顏料、天色的人 (或物)
coloring/colouring.ex: She used some red food coloring for the cake.

colorless/colourless.def: 無色的、乏味的、蒼白地 (淡)
colorless/colourless.ex: The colorless liquid was actually pure water.

colossal.def: 巨大的、龐大的的人的人物 (巨)
colossal.ex: A colossal statue of the king stood in the park.

colossus.def: 巨人、巨型雕像人物 (單數)
colossus.ex: The great colossus could be seen from the sea.

colostrum.ex: Colostrum is very rich in vital antibodies.

colt.def: 小馬、初出茅廬的人人物 (單數)
colt.ex: The frisky young colt was running in the field.

colter/coulter.ex: The sharp colter sliced through the heavy soil.

column.def: 柱、專欄、縱隊、列人物 (單數)
column.col: newspaper column, ionic column, column of smoke
column.ex: He writes a weekly sports column for newspaper.

columnist.ex: The political columnist is very famous today.

colza.ex: Colza oil was once used for lighting lamps.

coma.def: 昏迷、(天)髮狀物人物 (單數)
coma.col: deep coma, fall into a coma
coma.ex: The patient fell into a deep coma after accident.

comatose.def: 昏迷的、不省人事的的人的人物
comatose.ex: He remained in a comatose state for two weeks.

comb.def: 梳子、雞冠、梳理、搜尋的人的人的人物
comb.ex: I need a better comb for my thick curly hair.

combat.def: 戰鬥、格鬥、防止、反對的人的人的人物
combat.col: hand-to-hand combat, combat mission, in combat
combat.ex: The soldiers were trained for close hand combat.

combatant.def: 戰鬥員、參戰國的人物 (單數)
combatant.ex: The unarmed combatant was taken as a prisoner.

combated.def: 已戰鬥的、已反對的人的人 (或物)
combated.ex: They combated the fire for over twelve hours.

combative.def: 好戰的、好鬥的人的人物
combative.ex: He was in a very combative mood this morning.

comber.def: 梳理者、捲浪、梳棉機人物 (單數)
comber.ex: A giant comber crashed onto the sandy beach.

combination.def: 結合、組合、連身內衣的人物 (單數)
combination.col: color combination, combination lock, safe combination
combination.ex: I forgot the combination for the heavy safe.

combine.def: 結合、聯合、收割機的人的人的人物
combine.ex: The two big teams decided to combine efforts.

combined.def: 結合了的、聯合的人的人 (或物)
combined.ex: The combined forces won a great victory today.

combing.ex: The police are combing the woods for clues.

combings.ex: She gathered the small hair combings slowly.
